title: Just Enough Professions (JEP)
description: A JEI addon that adds profession workstations
body:
This mod adds new functionality to JEI. This new functionality allows the user to determine which worktables are required for each villager profession.

To do so you can use JEI's Uses key (Default: U) on an Emerald or Villager Spawn Egg and it will display a list of all Villager Professions. If you wanna know what mod added the profession you can hold shift to make it display the mod id in front of the profession.

If you're searching for a REI equivalent see Roughly Enough Professions (REP)

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco

  -ShyNieke
